# Slate — goals & non-goals

## Goals
- Make booking an appointment take under 30 seconds for a returning customer.
- Give support agents a single console to resolve any appointment issue.
- Never double-book a slot.

## Non-goals
- Payments/checkout — we integrate with an external PSP; Slate never stores cards.
- Calendar sync (Google/Outlook) — maybe later, explicitly out of scope for now.
- A provider-facing mobile app.

## Open questions
- Should reschedules be unlimited for premium providers?
- Do we need waitlists for fully-booked providers?
